name: nginx-multisite
description: Provisions a hardened multi-site Nginx reverse proxy with three SSL-enabled virtual hosts, self-signed TLS certificate generation via OpenSSL, UFW firewall rules, fail2ban intrusion prevention, SSH lockdown, and kernel-level sysctl hardening.

name: cache
description: Installs and configures a dual caching layer consisting of Memcached and Redis (with password authentication and a dedicated log directory), including a post-install Ruby-block hack that strips deprecated directives from the generated Redis config file.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Performs an end-to-end deployment of a Python FastAPI application from a public GitHub repository, including system package installation, Python virtual environment setup, PostgreSQL database and user provisioning, a .env configuration file, and a systemd unit for process management.
